name: studio-cost
title: Cost Optimization & Sustainability
subtitle: cost by source, tiering candidates & carbon — a full showcase
description: Flagship example built in Analytics — KPIs, treemap, donut and a cumulative-spend trend over the cost & sustainability sample queries.

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(monthly_cost_usd)::numeric,0) AS monthly, ROUND(SUM(monthly_cost_usd)*12::numeric,0) AS annual, ROUND(SUM(co2e_kg)/1000::numeric,1) AS co2e_tonnes, ROUND(SUM(monthly_cost_usd*dup_savings_bytes/NULLIF(size_bytes,0))::numeric,0) AS reclaimable FROM entity_storage_demo WHERE datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens}

dataAccesses.name: CostBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT datasource_type AS src, ROUND(SUM(monthly_cost_usd)::numeric,0) AS cost FROM entity_storage_demo WHERE datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: CostBySens
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT sensitivity AS sens, ROUND(SUM(monthly_cost_usd)::numeric,0) AS cost FROM entity_storage_demo WHERE datasource_type LIKE ${ds} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: Co2eBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT datasource_type AS src, ROUND(SUM(co2e_kg)/1000::numeric,2) AS tonnes FROM entity_storage_demo WHERE datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: ReclaimBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT datasource_type AS src, ROUND(SUM(monthly_cost_usd*dup_savings_bytes/NULLIF(size_bytes,0))::numeric,0) AS cost FROM entity_storage_demo WHERE datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 HAVING SUM(dup_savings_bytes)>0 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: CostTrend
dataAccesses.sql: WITH first_scan AS ( SELECT s.entity_key, MIN(d.year_month_number) AS ym, MIN(d.year_month_name) AS ymn FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_date d ON s.scanned_date_key=d.date_key WHERE s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY 1) SELECT fs.ymn AS month, ROUND(SUM(st.monthly_cost_usd)::numeric,0) AS cost, ROUND(SUM(SUM(st.monthly_cost_usd)) OVER (ORDER BY fs.ym)::numeric,0) AS cum_cost FROM entity_storage_demo st JOIN first_scan fs ON st.entity_key=fs.entity_key WHERE st.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(st.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY fs.ym, fs.ymn ORDER BY fs.ym

kpis.label: Monthly Cost
kpis.info: Estimated monthly storage spend across all in-scope objects.

kpis.label: CO2e / yr (t)
kpis.info: Estimated annual carbon footprint of storing this data.

kpis.label: Reclaimable / mo
kpis.info: Monthly spend tied up in duplicate copies — the fastest savings.

panels.title: Monthly Cost by Data Source
panels.info: Where the storage budget goes, by platform.

panels.title: Reclaimable Spend by Source
panels.info: Monthly savings from removing duplicate data.

panels.title: Carbon (CO2e) by Source
panels.info: Estimated annual CO2e of each source's footprint.

panels.title: Cloud Spend Growth
panels.info: Cumulative monthly spend over time — the slope is your cost-growth rate.
